rationale: Section governs charter district bond guarantee capacity based on student enrollment ratios and bond ratings. No reference to homestead exemptions or property tax appraisal values; no direct conflict with Tax Code §11.13(b) changes.
quote: the charter capacity of the guaranteed bond program is the percentage of the total capacity of the guaranteed bond program established by the board under Sections 45.053(d) and 45.0531 that is equal to the percentage of the number of students enrolled in open-enrollment charter schools
_note: No direct textual link between homestead exemption amounts and charter bond guarantee capacity or bond rating provisions in this section.
